calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: RAYMOND WONG; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2019 Continued To Oct-29-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Paul Martin, Esq. appearing specially for Plaintiff. The CRC 3.1385 Order to Show Cause is reset to Oct-29-2019 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2019 Continued To Aug-27-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Special Appearance by Reed Snook, Esq. for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Aug-27-2019 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-02-2019 Continued To Jul-09-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Mitchell Wong, Esq. appeared specially for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Jul-09-2019 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk J Lee. Proceedings not reported. (610)
